feature.title: Bypass Feature Tool
feature.description: A high-performance bypass, injector, or system tool loaded by operators in real-time.

id.description: Unique identifier of the tool injector.

name.description: Public name or brand of the cyber tool.

img.description: Image illustration URL representing the tool category.

link.description: Redirect external launch URL (e.g. WhatsApp channel).

category.description: The category classification (Aim Mods, Sensors, Bypass, Security).

status.description: Active status parameter of the tool (e.g., ACTIVE, OFFLINE, BETA).

description.description: Exploratory telemetry metadata description explaining what the injector does.

/features/{featureId}.description: Real-time list of live telemetry injectors shared across operator terminals.
